Yuck!: Let's have some fun with it.
Humans!  Why is it always humans?
I think it wants to play with us.
Human, do you know how to dance?
All he wants to do is dance.
We can show it how, can't we?
呃！: 我們可以教它怎麼跳，對吧？

Yuck!: We know how to make you dance.
呃！: 我們知道怎麼讓你跳舞。

Yuck!: We love to teach you how to dance.
呃！: 我們喜歡教你怎麼跳舞。

Yuck!: What can you expect from a human?
呃！: 你還能對人類期望什麼？

Yuck!: It does know how to dance.
Gee, I didn't think it could do this.
呃！: 天哪，我沒想到它會這樣。
每個人都知道人類吃動物。

Yuck!: What are you bothering us for?
What do you want from us?
Now you're really going to get it!
呃！: 現在你真的要倒大楣了！

Yuck!: You'll never catch me.  Ha, ha!

呃！: 那就是你在這裡的原因嗎？

Yuck!: Why should we give it any dust?
呃！: 我們為什麼要給它仙粉？

Yuck!: It danced for us, didn't it?
Well, I say we give it some dust.
呃！: 嗯，我說我們應該給它一些仙粉。

Yuck!: That's because you have a crush on it.
Dewdrop's in love with a human.
If you love it, YOU give it some dust.
呃！: 如果你喜歡它，你去給它仙粉。

Yuck!: Make Mikey do it.  She'll touch anything!
呃！: 讓米基來做。她什麼都會摸！

Yuck!: All right, all right, but you all owe me!
呃！: 好吧、好吧，但你們都欠我人情！

Yuck!: Hold out your hand and close your eyes.
You will get a big surprise!
Oh, just give it some dust!
That's why we dance in rings of mushrooms.
呃！: 這就是為什麼我們在蘑菇圈裡跳舞。

Yuck!: You better not come into our ring!
呃！: 你最好別進入我們的圈子！

Yuck!: We never let humans into our ring.
呃！: 我們從不讓人類進入我們的圈子。

Yuck!: It takes forever to get the smell out!
呃！: 花很久才能把味道洗掉！

Yuck!: It spoils the magic when a human comes in.
呃！: 當人類進入時，魔法就被破壞了。

Yuck!: It makes us very, very angry!
呃！: 那讓我們非常、非常生氣！

Yuck!: We dance to make the flowers grow.
We sing to make the colors.
We're the prettiest things in the world!
呃！: 我們是世界上最漂亮的東西！

Yuck!: We just want to have fun!
She protects the forest and everything.
You'd better not make her mad!
